answer:
Zoho CRM provides a free edition for up to three users [1][2] and a separate, fully-featured Developer Edition for testing and building custom solutions [3][4]. The Developer Edition is free forever, does not expire, and is intended strictly for development and training rather than production use [4][5].

For API access, both the standard Free Edition and the Developer Edition include limits [6]. The Free Edition allows 5,000 API credits per day with a concurrency limit of five [6]. If your needs exceed these limits, you can self-serve to purchase additional credits via the API Dashboard using a pay-as-you-go model [6].
